author: Manuel Magaña
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. Open a customizable stock view that displays charts and widgets (heatmaps, tickers, symbol summaries, advanced charts, and more) powered by TradingView's free embeddable widgets.

manifest.author: Manuel Magaña López
manifest.description: Open a customizable stock view that displays charts and widgets (heatmaps, tickers, symbol summaries, advanced charts, and more) powered by TradingView's free embeddable widgets.
manifest.name: TradingView Widget

name: TradingView Widget

releases.author: TheManuelML
releases.description:
This new release do not add anyhting new to the plugin. 

Just adds to the repo the `.github/` directory with the workflows to get a 100% score in the Obsidian community page: https://community.obsidian.md/plugins/tradingview-widget

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/TheManuelML/obsidian-tradeview/compare/1.0.0...1.0.1
